title: sinosidus polius
side_effects: Sinosidus polius can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe stomach cramps, nausea, and diarrhea due to its high toxicity. Prolonged consumption of the plant can also lead to respiratory issues, including coughing and difficulty breathing. In extreme cases, excessive use of sinosidus polius can result in liver damage and even kidney failure. Additionally, it may interact negatively with certain medications, exacerbating pre-existing health conditions and causing adverse reactions.
